query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on the technical methodology of cross-lingual text-to-speech and voice conversion using latent embeddings, which does not address the user's specific question regarding the *evaluation framework* (EVA-Bench) for voice agents. While both involve voice technology, the candidate paper lacks the necessary connection to the "end-to-end evaluation" mechanism, metrics, or benchmarking constructs central to the user's research question, failing to meet criteria (a) or (b) for inclusion
